name: @aipehub/example-cross-hub-workflow
description: Cross-hub workflow orchestration (跨 hub 工作流编排) — two hubs in one process. A workflow on the consumer hub dispatches a step to a CAPABILITY on a peer hub, behind the Phase 18 outbound approval gate: the run parks, the owner approves, the task crosses the org boundary, and the peer's result flows back into the next (local) step. Deterministic, no API key.
